prompt: Mark my 'Call the office' to-do in the Taxes project as complete.
paraphrases: I finished the office call for my taxes — check that one off. (I have another to-do with the same name elsewhere; leave that one alone.)

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project=p.uuid WHERE t.title='Call the office' AND p.title='Taxes' AND t.status=3 AND t.trashed=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project=p.uuid WHERE t.title='Call the office' AND p.title='Studio move' AND t.status=0 AND t.trashed=0

pseudoScript: things todo complete "$(things show Taxes --json | jq -r '.data.view.active[]|select(.title=="Call the office")|.uuid')"
